summary: Terminal tmux session layout, colored active-session badge, and refreshed marketing screenshots.

introduced: Terminal workspace shows a colored active-session badge beside attach and detach commands
Marketing screenshot capture uses env vars and a flat sidebar layout for reliable workspace PNGs
changed: tmux session list renamed to List of available tmux sessions and shown in a two-column draggable grid
Session cards use green, orange, and neutral styling for live, attached elsewhere, and available states
Marketing website workspace screenshots regenerated for all seven sidebar panes
updated: npm run capture:marketing-screenshots captures each workspace pane into website/public
